languages.text: "Разум генетора Фебруса столь многогранен... Лазурь, кобальт, индиго — как же велика его тяга осмыслить устройство сего мира! Но где-то внутри, в самом естестве синевы, прячется тягостное чувство, заключенное в кокон из терракоты. Оно почти ускользает от взора, но впитывает в себя все прочие оттенки — и рано или поздно поглотит их все, без остатка".

"Genetor Februs's mind is so multifaceted... Azure, cobalt, indigo — how great is his drive to understand the workings of this world! But somewhere inside, in the very substance of all this blue, there is a cocoon of terracotta that holds within it some grievous feeling. It almost eludes my sight, but it absorbs all other hues — and sooner or later, it will consume them all, leaving nothing behind."
languages.original_text: "Разум генетора Фебруса столь многогранен... Лазурь, кобальт, индиго — как же велика его тяга осмыслить устройство сего мира! Но где-то внутри, в самом естестве синевы, прячется тягостное чувство, заключенное в кокон из терракоты. Оно почти ускользает от взора, но впитывает в себя все прочие оттенки — и рано или поздно поглотит их все, без остатка".

traits.locale_text: "Genetor Februs's mind is so multifaceted... Azure, cobalt, indigo — how great is his drive to understand the workings of this world! But somewhere inside, in the very nature of the blue, hides a mournful sentiment, trapped within a terracotta cocoon. It almost eludes the gaze, yet it absorbs all other shades —and sooner or later, it will consume them all, leaving nothing behind."

"Genetor Februs's mind is so multifaceted... Azure, cobalt, indigo — how great is his drive to understand the workings of this world! But somewhere inside, in the very nature of the blue, hides a mournful sentiment, trapped within a terracotta cocoon. It almost eludes the gaze, yet it absorbs all other shades —and sooner or later, it will consume them all, leaving nothing behind."

But somewhere inside, in the very substance of all this blue, there is a cocoon of terracotta that holds within it some grievous feeling. It almost eludes my sight, but it absorbs all other hues — and sooner or later, it will consume them all, leaving nothing behind."

"Genetor Februs's mind is so multifaceted... Azure, cobalt, indigo — how great is his drive to understand the workings of this world! But somewhere inside, in the very substance of all this blue, there is a cocoon of terracotta that holds within it some grievous feeling. It almost eludes my sight, but it absorbs all other hues — and sooner or later, it will consume them all, leaving nothing behind."

languages.text: «La mente del genetor Februs es polifacética... Azul, cobalto, añil... ¡sus ganas de entender cómo funciona el mundo son impresionantes! Pero en su interior, en medio de todos esos tonos azulados, hay una crisálida de terracota que encierra un gran dolor. Casi no la he visto, pero absorbe los otros tonos... y tarde o temprano, los devorará todos sin dejar nada atrás».
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs's mind is so multifaceted... Azure, cobalt, indigo — how great is his drive to understand the workings of this world! But somewhere inside, in the very substance of all this blue, there is a cocoon of terracotta that holds within it some grievous feeling. It almost eludes my sight, but it absorbs all other hues — and sooner or later, it will consume them all, leaving nothing behind."

traits.locale_text: «La mente del genetor Februs es polifacética... Azul, cobalto, añil... ¡sus ganas de entender cómo funciona el mundo son impresionantes! Pero en su interior, en medio de todos esos tonos azulados, hay una crisálida de terracota que encierra un gran dolor. Casi no la he visto, pero absorbe los otros tonos... y tarde o temprano, los devorará todos sin dejar nada atrás».

languages.text: “基因士费布鲁斯的心智真是层次繁复……天蓝、钴蓝、靛蓝——他想要理解这世界运作规律的渴望竟如此强烈！但在他内心深处，在这片蓝色最本真的地方，有一个陶土色的茧，里面封存着某种极其沉重的情感。它差点被我忽视，但它在吞噬所有其他色彩。迟早有一天，它会将所有颜色吞噬殆尽，什么也不留下。”
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs's mind is so multifaceted... Azure, cobalt, indigo — how great is his drive to understand the workings of this world! But somewhere inside, in the very substance of all this blue, there is a cocoon of terracotta that holds within it some grievous feeling. It almost eludes my sight, but it absorbs all other hues — and sooner or later, it will consume them all, leaving nothing behind."

traits.locale_text: “基因士费布鲁斯的心智真是层次繁复……天蓝、钴蓝、靛蓝——他想要理解这世界运作规律的渴望竟如此强烈！但在他内心深处，在这片蓝色最本真的地方，有一个陶土色的茧，里面封存着某种极其沉重的情感。它差点被我忽视，但它在吞噬所有其他色彩。迟早有一天，它会将所有颜色吞噬殆尽，什么也不留下。”

languages.text: "Der Verstand von Genetor Februs ist so facettenreich ... Azur, Kobalt, Indigo ... wie stark ist sein Wunsch, die Mechanismen dieser Welt zu verstehen! Aber irgendwo in seinem Inneren, in der Substanz all dieser Blautöne, gibt es einen Kokon aus Terracotta, der ein schmerzliches Gefühl verbirgt. Fast entzieht er sich meinem Blick, absorbiert aber alle anderen Farben ... und früher oder später wird er sie alle verzehren und nichts zurücklassen."
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs's mind is so multifaceted... Azure, cobalt, indigo — how great is his drive to understand the workings of this world! But somewhere inside, in the very substance of all this blue, there is a cocoon of terracotta that holds within it some grievous feeling. It almost eludes my sight, but it absorbs all other hues — and sooner or later, it will consume them all, leaving nothing behind."

Aber irgendwo in seinem Inneren, in der Substanz all dieser Blautöne, gibt es einen Kokon aus Terracotta, der ein schmerzliches Gefühl verbirgt. Fast entzieht er sich meinem Blick, absorbiert aber alle anderen Farben ... und früher oder später wird er sie alle verzehren und nichts zurücklassen."

languages.text: « L'esprit du genetor Februs possède de multiples facettes... Azur, cobalt, indigo... Ô combien puissant, son désir de comprendre les rouages de ce monde ! Et quelque part dans la substance même de tout ce bleu se niche un cocon couleur de rouille qui renferme en son sein quelque sentiment accablant. Pour un peu, il échapperait presque à mon regard, mais il absorbe toutes les autres nuances. Tôt ou tard, il finira par les consumer entièrement, ne laissant derrière lui qu'un vide béant. »
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs's mind is so multifaceted... Azure, cobalt, indigo — how great is his drive to understand the workings of this world! But somewhere inside, in the very substance of all this blue, there is a cocoon of terracotta that holds within it some grievous feeling. It almost eludes my sight, but it absorbs all other hues — and sooner or later, it will consume them all, leaving nothing behind."

Pour un peu, il échapperait presque à mon regard, mais il absorbe toutes les autres nuances. Tôt ou tard, il finira par les consumer entièrement, ne laissant derrière lui qu'un vide béant. »

languages.text: "Genetör Februs'un zihni o kadar çok yönlü ki... Gök mavisi, kobalt, çivit mavisi... Bu dünyanın işleyişini anlama arzusu ne kadar büyük! Ancak içeride bir yerlerde, tüm bu mavinin ta kendisinde; içinde bazı kederli duyguları barındıran pişmiş topraktan bir koza var. Neredeyse gözümden kaçacakken diğer tüm tonları emiyor. Er ya da geç, geride hiçbir şey bırakmadan hepsini tüketecek."
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs's mind is so multifaceted... Azure, cobalt, indigo — how great is his drive to understand the workings of this world! But somewhere inside, in the very substance of all this blue, there is a cocoon of terracotta that holds within it some grievous feeling. It almost eludes my sight, but it absorbs all other hues — and sooner or later, it will consume them all, leaving nothing behind."

Ancak içeride bir yerlerde, tüm bu mavinin ta kendisinde; içinde bazı kederli duyguları barındıran pişmiş topraktan bir koza var. Neredeyse gözümden kaçacakken diğer tüm tonları emiyor. Er ya da geç, geride hiçbir şey bırakmadan hepsini tüketecek."

languages.text: 「ジェネトール・フェブルスの心は多面体…蒼、コバルト、インディゴ…この世界の仕組みを理解したいという彼の強い意志は素晴らしい。しかし、その青の根底には、土色の繭があり、そこには深い感情が隠されている。それは私の視界を逃れようとするが、他の色を吸収し、やがては全てを飲み込み、何も残さないだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs's mind is so multifaceted... Azure, cobalt, indigo — how great is his drive to understand the workings of this world! But somewhere inside, in the very substance of all this blue, there is a cocoon of terracotta that holds within it some grievous feeling. It almost eludes my sight, but it absorbs all other hues — and sooner or later, it will consume them all, leaving nothing behind."
